---
title: "Penguin sizes"
author: "Charles Costanzo"
format: html
self-contained: TRUE
---

# Introduction

We have data on `r knitr::inline_expr("nrow(penguins)")` penguins
from three species.

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: FALSE
#| warning: FALSE
library(palmerpenguins)
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(penguins, aes(x = body_mass_g)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, 
                 color = "black", 
                 fill = rgb(0, 206/255, 209/255)) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Body Mass (grams)",
       x = "Body Mass (grams)",
       y = "Count of Penguins") 
```

The distribution looks roughly **bimodal**, with two peaks.
